name: pm-qlkt
description: PM QLKT - root orchestrator for BE-QLKT + FE-QLKT

scripts.install:all: npm run install:be && npm run install:fe
scripts.build: npm run build:be && npm run build:fe
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run restart
scripts.typecheck: cd BE-QLKT && npm run typecheck && cd ../FE-QLKT && npm run typecheck
